title: limniris ensata
intro: Limniris ensata, also known as the Japanese iris, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia. The roots and rhizomes of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limniris ensata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
